random_forest_classification.description: Supervised Random Forest classification for multisource raster features using point/polygon training data.

inputs.label: Input feature rasters (single-band list). Order must be consistent between training and prediction.

training_data.label: Training vector layer (points or polygons) with class labels.

class_field.label: Class label field in training attributes. Must contain categorical class IDs or names.

scaling.label: Feature scaling {none, normalize, standardize} (default none). Use scaling when input bands have very different ranges.

n_trees.label: Number of trees (default 200). More trees improve stability but increase runtime and memory.

min_samples_leaf.label: Minimum samples per leaf (default 1). Higher values reduce overfitting but can smooth class boundaries.

min_samples_split.label: Minimum samples required to split a node (default 2). Increase for noisier training sets.

output.label: Output classified raster path [optional]. If omitted, result remains in memory.

random_forest_regression.description: Random Forest regression for continuous targets (e.g., biomass, moisture, temperature) from raster predictors.

training_data.label: Training point layer with numeric target values.

field.label: Numeric target field in training attributes.

n_trees.label: Number of trees (default 200). Increase for smoother predictions and lower variance.

min_samples_leaf.label: Minimum samples per leaf (default 1). Larger values regularize predictions.

min_samples_split.label: Minimum samples to split (default 2). Increase for noisy or sparse training data.

fuzzy_knn_classification.description: Fuzzy k-NN classification that yields soft class membership and optional probability surfaces.

training_data.label: Training vector layer with labeled samples.

class_field.label: Class field in training data attributes.

k.label: Number of neighbors k (default 5). Higher k is smoother and less sensitive to noise; lower k preserves local detail.

m.label: Fuzzy exponent m (>1, default 2.0). Higher m increases class overlap (softer memberships).

probability_output.label: Output membership-probability raster [optional]. Useful for uncertainty interpretation.

wetland_hydrogeomorphic_classification.description: Classify wetlands into hydrogeomorphic classes using DEM context and wetland masks.

wetland_mask.label: Wetland mask raster (>0 treated as wetland).

max_polygon_features.label: Maximum output wetland polygon features. Increase for complex landscapes; reduce for faster runs.

wetland_region.label: Regional HGM calibration pack. Select region matching local geomorphic-hydrologic setting.
